hooks.command: session=$(tmux display-message -p '#S' 2>/dev/null); config=$(grep "^$session:" ~/dotfiles/tmux/session-colors 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$config" ]; then sound=$(echo "$config" | cut -d: -f3); emoji=$(echo "$config" | cut -d: -f4); else sound=Glass; emoji=; fi; terminal-notifier -title "$emoji $session (cc)" -message "Task complete" -sound "$sound" -activate com.mitchellh.ghostty -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/tmux switch-client -t $session"

session=$(tmux display-message -p '#S' 2>/dev/null); config=$(grep "^$session:" ~/dotfiles/tmux/session-colors 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$config" ]; then sound=$(echo "$config" | cut -d: -f3); emoji=$(echo "$config" | cut -d: -f4); else sound=Glass; emoji=; fi; terminal-notifier -title "$emoji $session (cc)" -message "Waiting for input" -sound "$sound" -activate com.mitchellh.ghostty -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/tmux switch-client -t $session"
